metadata.description: Guy Soffer's plugin marketplace — AI-assisted development workflow tools

plugins.name: blueprint
plugins.description: Set up a structured AI-assisted development workflow for any project. Installs agent roles, three-track process, and project-doctor. Configures everything for your tech stack.

plugins.name: project-doctor
plugins.description: Deep codebase health check: dead code removal, bug detection, security audit, sanity checks, and documentation sync. Works with any tech stack.
